changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose SKILL.md (296 lines + 5 reference files)

Rewrote SKILL.md to ~50 lines: removed all reference files, cut philosophical prose, added concrete bug-pattern table with common fixes, streamlined 4-phase process to 4 direct steps. Reduced token overhead significantly.

notes: Model achieved 100/100 on both tasks from iteration 1. Optimization focused on reducing skill size from 296 lines + 5 reference files to ~50 lines with no reference files, cutting cost (~14% cheaper) and time (~50% faster) while maintaining perfect scores.
